rounds: Lavendra with the full kit — necklace, black bag, Noskin loafers, people who actually know him — that one was won clean. Purple Country Road bag to the food shop, self-talk caught live and overruled, was also a win. The poncho is still on at Balmoral both weeks running — the jockstrap choice is there, the exposure isn't quite. Apollo ring and necklace stayed home from work — pool nerves, ring size, 'reads as obviously gay' — that one's named, not defensively, but it's still a loss.
pattern: They're quiet with strangers, loud with his people — but the real grip right now is anything that reads as obviously, unambiguously gay rather than just a little different.
